title: LoadEmUp
description: Advanced plugin reloader for Spigot — smart, safe, and production-ready.
body:
# LoadEmUp (Beta) — Plugin Reloading, Reimagined

**LoadEmUp** is the culmination of countless hours of development and testing, built to bring you *safe*, *smart*, and *seamless* plugin management for Spigot servers. Whether you're running a small community server or a bustling public hub, LoadEmUp lets you **load**, **unload**, **enable**, **disable**, and **reload** plugins dynamically — no server restarts required.


## 🚀 Why LoadEmUp?

- **Total Control** — Reload only the plugins you want without disrupting your whole server.
- **Rock-solid Safety** — Includes built-in virus scanning, dependency checks, and integrity validation to help prevent crashes and downtime — though some plugins may still cause issues.
- **Smart Dependency Management** — Automatically respects plugin dependencies and their relationships.


## 📦 Easy Installation

LoadEmUp works on Spigot 1.13+ with Java 17+. Just drop the latest `.jar` into your plugins folder and restart your server. That’s it!


## 🛠️ Features at a Glance

- 🛡️ Virus & Threat Scanning support
- 🔗 Dependency and dependant detection  
- 🧩 File integrity and metadata validation  
- ✅ Safe reload execution only if all checks pass  
- ⚡ Full lifecycle support: load, unload, enable, disable, reload  


## 🎮 Who Should Use LoadEmUp?

LoadEmUp is perfect for:

- Server admins who want to update or fix plugins without downtime  
- Developers testing plugin changes on production-like environments  
- Communities demanding maximum uptime and stability  


## 🛡️ Compatibility

Designed for Spigot and its forks (Paper, Purpur, etc.), LoadEmUp plays nicely with most plugins. Complex plugins with heavy state might need special care — always check your reload status!

## 🔍 Under Development Features

There are some features still under development. One of them is adding support for proxy softwares (BungeeCord, Velocity and Waterfall) and Folia, which is currently our main priority. Other feature coming soon are the following:

- Async plugin loading strategy
- Malware/Threat scans before every load
- Support for legacy versions.


## 🧑‍💻 For Plugin Developers

Don’t want LoadEmUp to perform certain actions on your plugin — or prefer it not to run at all? No problem. LoadEmUp provides a simple way to opt out or restrict what operations it can perform on your plugin.

Check out the [Developer Documentation](https://gurwiworks.gitbook.io/loademup-wiki/developer/leu-file) to learn how to:

- Mark your plugin as **non-reloadable**  
- Block specific actions (e.g. disable, unload or reload) 

Give your plugin full control over how it interacts with LoadEmUp — no surprises, no hacks.


## ❤️ Support Development

Love LoadEmUp? Follow us on **Modrinth** and share it with your fellow server admins.
